title: rubus coreanus
intro: Rubus coreanus, also known as the Korean black raspberry, is a perennial shrub native to East Asia, characterized by its dark purple fruit and edible leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Rubus coreanus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Rubus coreanus is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
